title: zamar #2167
definition:
1) to sing, sing praise, make music
    1a) (Piel)
        1a1) to make music, sing
        1a2) to play a musical instrument
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to sing, sing praise, make music
    1a) (Piel)
        1a1) to make music, sing
        1a2) to play a musical instrument

    NASB:  to make music (in praise of God)
